doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_greaterequal_p: greater-or-equal predicate. Returns true iff a >= b. NaN-vs-anything returns false. +0 == -0 returns true. Class 'arithmetic' (50ms budget).
divergence_from_c: C returns int; TS returns boolean. Predicates do NOT throw on NaN — returns false. See ../mpfr_less_p/spec.json for shared rationale.
